nasb.text: No longer drink water exclusively, but use a little wine for the sake of your stomach and your frequent ailments.

esv.text: (No longer drink only water, but use a little wine for the sake of your stomach and your frequent ailments.)

cnv.text: 因為你的胃不好，而且身體常常軟弱，不要單單喝水，可以稍微用點酒。

ccb.text: 你的胃不好，经常生病，不要只喝水，要稍微喝一点酒。

csbs.text: 由于你胃的问题和常患的那些疾病，你今后不要只喝水，要用一点酒。
